title: DDB Roll Cards
description: Pipes D&D Beyond dice rolls into Foundry as polished, D&D-Beyond-styled chat cards: a GM battle readout (hit/AC, per-target saves & damage portions, apply-all, conditions) plus a public result card for players. Self-contained — connects to the DDB game log on its own (no MidiQOL, no ddb-sync needed). Optionally rides ddb-sync's connection if that module is still installed.
